subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted, O ye who are faithful! I lay my head on the threshold of the manifest Light and supplicate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنجذبون ایها المخلصون انی اضع الجبین علی وصید النور المبین و اتضرع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
